value.found_quote: You can also include the [code interpreter](https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/tools-code-interpreter) tool to allow the model to perform complex analysis by writing code.
value.rationale: The page explicitly states that deep research models (o3-deep-research and o4-mini-deep-research) can include the code interpreter tool to perform complex analysis by writing code. The page also shows working code examples with `"type": "code_interpreter"` included in the tools array, and mentions `code_interpreter_call` as a valid output item type. This directly substantiates the claim that deep research models can write and execute code to perform complex quantitative analysis as part of a research task.
